title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 141.210 - Title of law
text:
141.210.  Title of law. — Sections 141.210 to 141.810 and sections 141.980 to 141.1015 shall be known by the short title of "Land Tax Collection Law".
(L. 1943 p. 1029 § 1, A.L. 2012 H.B. 1659 & 1116) 
(1952) Land Tax Collection Law is not a local or special law prohibited by § 40, Art. III of the constitution nor does it violate § 8, Art. VI relating to classification of counties. Collector v. Parcels of Land, 362 Mo. 1054, 247 S.W.2d 83.
